experience.title: Accountant
bullets: prepare financials supporting corporate/individual tax filings

skills_and_achievements: Financial reporting & analysis, month/year-end close, GL/JE/accruals, AP/AR, payroll & benefits, fixed assets, inventory/cost accounting, budgeting/forecasting, audits, sales & payroll tax, process improvement; SAP, Oracle/Hyperion/Essbase, QuickBooks, MS Excel/Word/PowerPoint/Access; contract negotiation; customer/vendor relations.
